text.div: Doxorubicin IV 10 mg recon soln 1 recon soln
Erythromycin Ethylsuccinate Oral 1 400 mg tablet every 6 hours
Potassium Chloride Oral ER Tab 1 20 mEq tablet,ER particles/crystals twice daily
G: 1000 mcg<br/><hr/>Granisetron IV<br/><hr/>1000 mcg intravenously once. <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'></span>

G: 460 mg<br/><hr/>Zirabev (Bevacizumab-bvzr IV)<br/><hr/> 460 mg (5 mg/kg; Weight: 92.99 kg = 460 mg) intravenously Piggyback once. <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>Admin over:</span> 30 minutes <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>Admix fluid:</span> 0.9 % Sodium Chloride <span class='g2FormLabel'>Instructions:</span> <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionInstructions'>Dilute with NS to a total volume of 100 mL. NOTE: This is Zirabev.</span><br/> <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'></span>

dosageInstruction.text:
Dilute with NS to a total volume of 100 mL.
NOTE: This is Zirabev.

text.div: G: 1080 mg<br/><hr/>Fluorouracil IV<br/><hr/> 1080 mg (500 mg/m2; BSA: 2.15 m2 = 1080 mg) intravenously Push once. <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>Admin over:</span> 2 minutes <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>to</span> 4 minutes <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'></span>

G: 1075 mg<br/><hr/>Leucovorin IV<br/><hr/> 1075 mg (500 mg/m2; BSA: 2.15 m2 = 1075 mg) intravenously Piggyback once. <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>Admin over:</span> 90 minutes <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>to</span> 120 minutes <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>Volume:</span> 250 mL <span class='g2FormLabel'>Instructions:</span> <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionInstructions'>Dilute in 250 mL NS or D5W.</span><br/> <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'></span>

dosageInstruction.text: Dilute in 250 mL NS or D5W.

text.div: <span class='generateShortDescriptionForMedAbstractOrder'>Abemaciclib Oral Dose Pack</span><br/><hr/>Abemaciclib Oral Dose Pack 150 mg tablet<br/><hr/>150 mg orally 2 times per day. <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionInstructions'>Take whole with water, with or without food at the same time each day.</span><br/> <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>Dispense:</span> 56 Tablet <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>Refills:</span> 5 <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>Allow Substitution</span><br/>

dosageInstruction.text: Take whole with water, with or without food at the same time each day.
